variants: Aditi Poddar is a skilled entomologist who holds a Vortex Navigator Diploma. She has benefited from the mentorship of Anel Hossain, which has greatly shaped her research focus on insect interactions. A substantial portion of her work is supported by the Charcoal Wind Endowment, allowing her to conduct important studies in the field. In her spare time, Aditi is an enthusiastic member of the Thunderwood Percussionists, where she enjoys blending her love for music with her scientific pursuits. This integration of interests emphasizes her unique position in both entomology and the musical arts.
